ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day when the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour when the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute when the data was collected */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second when the data was collected */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Duration of the measurement in seconds */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 concentration in ppm */,
  "h2o" REAL /* H2O vapor concentration in g/m³ */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the monitoring station */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement units */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES station_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES monitoring_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data entry is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality of the data */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the data quality */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES monitoring_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of data */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration for the data source */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance for the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., CO2, Temperature) */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., ppm, °C) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit (e.g., from ppm to parts per billion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_records" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "is_calibrated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is calibrated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_records_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "task_performed" TEXT /* Description of the task performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of station */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of monitoring station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capabilities of the station */,
  "max_operating_temperature" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature of the station */,
  "min_operating_temperature" REAL /* Minimum operating temperature of the station */,
  "max_operating_pressure" REAL /* Maximum operating pressure of the station */,
  "min_operating_pressure" REAL /* Minimum operating pressure of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
